job_title: Executive Assistant / Office Manager - C-Suite Support
strengths: Strong MS Office skills including Word/Excel/PPT/Outlook
Extensive calendar and travel management experience
CRM and pivot table reporting experience
weaknesses: College degree field not tied to administrative focus
improvement_bullets: Managed executive expense reporting and reconciliation using Concur and manual tracking systems, ensuring 100% compliance with corporate spending policies.

Provided comprehensive office management and reception coverage, serving as the primary point of contact for high-profile clients and visitors to ensure a professional and welcoming front-office environment.
Successfully maintained office operations and front-desk reception, while demonstrating the professional resilience and flexibility required to navigate fast-paced, high-pressure environments.
Utilized advanced features in Word and PowerPoint to revise executive briefing materials, presentations, and correspondence, ensuring accuracy and alignment with corporate branding.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Executive Assistant / Office Manager - C-Suite Support opportunity with Miller Klein Group, LLC. I am interested in this opportunity because of your firm’s rapid growth within the consumer services sector and its requirement for high-level executive support. What interests me about working for Miller Klein Group, LLC is your commitment to operational excellence, which inspires me because I am dedicated to driving efficiency at the C-suite level. I believe my tenured experience in gatekeeping for multiple executives and my proficiency in office management would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached complex administrative problems with a proactive and thick-skinned mindset. In fact, at Direct Clean Solutions, I managed the calendars and travel logistics for three C-suite executives while simultaneously overseeing building operations and vendor coordination. This enabled the CEO and CFO to focus entirely on high-level business development, resulting in a 20% increase in workflow coordination efficiency. Ultimately, I know that the Executive Assistant / Office Manager role at Miller Klein Group, LLC would allow me to bring my expertise in heavy gatekeeping and meeting logistics to support your team. Additionally, my role as an Administrative Assistant at Apex Supply Co. enabled me to develop my comprehensive expense management and reception skills. I was responsible for high-volume invoice processing and managing front-office communications for a busy, high-traffic firm. This experience taught me how to shift priorities in real-time, ensuring that urgent executive needs were met while maintaining professional reception coverage. I am excited by the opportunity to use my advanced MS Office suite skills in working on complex document revisions and board-level presentations at Miller Klein Group, LLC. I know that my expertise in multi-executive support and my ability to adapt to fast-paced, changing demands align with what it takes to succeed at the Executive Assistant / Office Manager role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Millieann Velez
